mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, warehouse_no, warehouse_name,warehouse_type, owner_name, phone, address, province, city, region, remark, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
select
from warehouse where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

select
from warehouse where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and warehouse_name = #{name} and deleted = 0

select
from warehouse where warehouse_no = #{no} and deleted = 0

select
from warehouse where id in
#{item}
and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into warehouse (id, tenant_id, warehouse_no, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, owner_name, phone, address, province, city, region, remark, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{ownerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into warehouse
id,
tenant_id,
warehouse_no,
warehouse_name,
warehouse_type,
owner_name,
phone,
address,
province,
city,
region,
remark,
creator_id,
updator_id,
create_time,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{warehouseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{warehouseType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{ownerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update warehouse
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_no = #{warehouseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_type = #{warehouseType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
owner_name = #{ownerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update warehouse set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_no = #{warehouseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_type = #{warehouseType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, owner_name = #{ownerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update warehouse
warehouse_no = #{warehouseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_type = #{warehouseType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
owner_name = #{ownerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
